characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience:Red. Cyclops: The 2015 Max. Freudian Trio:Flain is SuperegoVulk is EgoZorch is Id Playing with Fire: Their tribe's elemental ability. Speed, Smarts and Strength: Zorch, Flain, and Vulk in that order.

characters.name: Infernites
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience:Red. Cyclops: The 2015 Max. Freudian Trio:Flain is SuperegoVulk is EgoZorch is Id Playing with Fire: Their tribe's elemental ability. Speed, Smarts and Strength: Zorch, Flain, and Vulk in that order.

characters.name: Cragsters
characters.description: Big, Thin, Short Trio: Krader (big), Seismo (thin), and Shuff (short) Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Dark grey with gold details. Dishing Out Dirt: Their abilities. Dumb Muscle: They might be strong, but their brains are seriously lacking. However, they are very cunning. Eat Dirt, Cheap: Regularly eat small rocks as a snack.

characters.name: Electroids
characters.description: Big, Thin, Short Trio: Volectro (big), Zaptor (thin), and Teslo (short) Color-Coded for Your Convenience:Yellow with purplish-blue details. Ditzy Genius: They're brilliant geniuses that live in the mountains to harness electricity. They're crazy as a result from this. Fantastic Light Source: The electricity-holding parts of their bodies can be used as flashlights. Harmless Electrocution: They zap to defend, not to kill. It still stings, though.

characters.name: Frosticons
characters.description: Animal Motifs: Notably many members of this tribe are more animalistic. Flurr as a draconic Mixel has a lizard-like appearance. Lunk resembles a sauropod. Chillbo has long claws resembling a sloth. Both Krog and Slumbo have appearances resembling frogs. Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Blue An Ice Person: Their elemental power. Required Secondary Powers: Save for Flurr, the Frosticons are slow and lethargic thanks to their climate and abilities. Subverted on their cousins. And I Must Scream:Played for Laughs. His "Upset" clip inCalling All Mixelsfeatures him crying to the point offreezing himself.

characters.name: Fang Gang
characters.description: Big Eater: To the point theyhave their own farm to sustain their hunger. Buzzsaw Jaw: An ability of all three members. Gobba can carve totem poles with his and Chomly has lost a tooth from eating like this. Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Brown. Extreme Omnivore: Often eat non-food items as well. Green Thumb: Have wood-based abilities.

characters.name: Flexers
characters.description: Animal Motifs: Loosely based on sea creatures. Kraw is a crab, Tentro is a squid, and Balk is a hammerhead shark. Their Max form resembles a lobster. Big, Thin, Short Trio: Balk (big), Tentro (thin), Kraw (short) Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Orange with black details. Combat Tentacles: Even the ones not based on a squid have stretchy black horns and "limbs". Flying Seafood Special: While they technically bounce rather than fly, all three of them and their Max form are based around sea creatures.

characters.name: Glorp Corp
characters.description: Allergic to Routine: All of them are thrill-seekers that live for adventure in their lives. Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Bright green with darker green details. Fun Personified: They live for the thrill in their lives. Muck Monster: All of them ooze slime. The Pig-Pen: It comes natural for their element, as they are all slobs and even made their home in a swamp.

characters.name: Spikels
characters.description: And Call Him "George": The three of them are very affectionate and think of themselves as cute and cuddly...but they keep forgetting that they're covered in spines. This is to the point that some of their attacks inCalling All Mixelsinvolves running up to hug Nixels and hurting ones in their way, or even the hugs themselves. Beauty, Brains, and Brawn: Scorpi is the Beauty, Footi is the Brains & Hoogi is the Brawn. Big, Thin, Short Trio: Hoogi (big), Footi (thin), Scorpi (short) Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Tan with silver details. In Touch with His Feminine Side: All three of them have feminine interests (Footi's ballet dancing, Hoogi's hugging and paper crafts, and Scorpi's sleepovers and snuggling), and their habitat is very feminine looking inCalling All Mixels(where it is less of a desert and more of a topiary garden)

characters.name: Wiztastics
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Purple with dark blue details. Magicians Are Wizards: They're travelling magicians, but their powers are straight-up magic. Stage Magician: Their major motif. Beware My Stinger Tail: His tail drops spells. Boring, but Practical: His biggest issue. He can perform spells no problem but he lacks the showmanship to make them pop.

characters.name: Orbitons
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Green and white. Insignificant Little Blue Planet: Sees Planet Mixel as inferior and pitiful. The Klutz: All three have no control over their weapons and spin out of control thanks to them. '50s Hair: Sports a fin-like pompadour with sideburns. Cyclops: One of many.

characters.name: Glowkies
characters.description: Bioluminescence Is Cool: Their sets use glow-in-the-dark LEGO pieces to invoke this, contrasting to their dark blue color scheme. Camp: They enjoy the flashy nightlife on the dark side of the moon. Cartoony Eyes: Their sclerae is off-yellow in the cartoon. Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Navy blue with glow-in-the-dark pale-yellow details. Dark Is Not Evil: Freaky yes, but they're actually fun-loving.

characters.name: Klinkers
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Brown and gold. Cool Old Guy: All three are old Mixels that still have it. Impoverished Patrician: The main three Klinkers were "captains of industry" in the industrial heyday, but their company has fallen on hard times, leading to it starting to wither and rust away. Noisy Robots: All are the most mechanical of the Mixels and make metal creaking and steam hydraulic noises when they move. Pungeon Master: All of them are not above cracking a very literal pun at times.

characters.name: Lixers
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Yellow and orange. Land, Sea, Sky: Each have their own domain of one: land for Spugg, sea for Turg, and sky for Tungster. Overly Long Tongue: All three sport one as their tribe's theme. The Unintelligible: All of them just make animal noises. Cyclops: One of many.

characters.name: Weldos
characters.description: Advertised Extra: The main tribe of Series 6, yet not counting the intro, they appear in only the last minute of their debut episode (A Quest for the Lost Mixamajig). Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Grey and yellow. The Engineer: All three of them, as it is their tribe motif. Small Role, Big Impact: They may not have a large role in The Quest for the Lost Mixamajig, but they play a great impact for building Mixopolis, the setting for later episodes. Bad Boss: Subverted, he is usually lovely, but can lose it if someone doesn't keep up with his pace.

characters.name: Munchos
characters.description: Big Eater: The only tribe whose appetite matches the Fang Gang tribe, albeit less insane and eat actual food. Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Purple and lavender. Cheerful Child: He's just an innocent kid. Jabba Table Manners: It is fun to watch him eat, but crumbs fly everywhere when he does it. Punny Name: Of "snacks"

characters.name: MCPD
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Blue and white with lighter blue and red highlights. Donut Mess with a Cop: All three like donuts and coffee. Emergency Services: Form the police branch of them. Police Are Useless: They mean well, but they arenotvery competent at their jobs. Reasonable Authority Figure: Although they're a bit too enthusiastic to make arrests at times, the three of them are still kind-hearted Mixels that are there to help the others.

characters.name: Medivals
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Brown and grey. Knight in Shining Armor: Their base designs. Our Dragons Are Different: The Medivals Max resembles a dragon with a catapult for a tail. Sir Verb-a-Lot: The family name of the main Medivals is "Mixelot", while Camillot is based on "Camelot" for his first name. Asleep in Class: Falls asleep during the class film being aired out of boredom, only to be woken up by the students laughing at him.

characters.name: Mixies
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Yellow and purple. Musical Anatomy: They have instrument-based bodies. Jamzy is an electric guitar, Tapsy is a drum set, and Trumpsy has a trumpet-like proboscis. Artistic License – Music: His brand is a "Frender Mixocaster", but he looks more like a Flying V. Cyclops: One of many. Punny Name: Of "jam".

characters.name: MCFD
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Red and yellow. Emergency Services: Form the firefighter side of them. Making a Splash: All have water-based abilities and names. Transforming Mecha: The MCFD Max can transform into a firetruck. The Leader: Of his tribe, though, like Kuffs, he has a higher boss as well.

characters.name: Pyrratz
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: A hodge-podge of brown, grey, green, and gold, with some red and white thrown in. Dinner Theatre: The Pyrratz have converted their ship into a restaurant where they perform shows. Pirate: Their tribe motif.A Pirate 400 Years Too Late: Swashbuckling pirates in modern Mixopolis. However, they run a dinner show restaurant as well. A Pirate 400 Years Too Late: Swashbuckling pirates in modern Mixopolis. However, they run a dinner show restaurant as well. Sticky Fingers: Both Sharx and Skulzy are compulsive thieves, which unnerves Lewt to no end, as he feels like he'll be the next target.

characters.name: Medix
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: White and light blue. Emergency Services: Form the medical side of them. The Medic: Take this role for Mixopolis. The Leader: Of his tribe. Dressed to Heal: Wears a forehead mirror.

characters.name: Trashoz
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Green and yellow. Extreme Omnivore: All three of them eat up the garbage they collect, and even eat Nixels. The Quiet One: None of them talk in-show, but they're shown conversing in the magazines and the website. Punny Name: Of "gobble", like Gobba's is. Stomach of Holding: Being a giant dumpster, he can hold objects without digesting them, and can also hide other Mixels inside him.

characters.name: Nindjas
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Black and orange. Famed in Story: They're legendary to the point of having a comic book written after them. Ninja: Their tribe theme. Technicolor Ninjas: They are bright black and orange, yet still as stealthy as ever. Our Dragons Are Different: The Nindjas Max

characters.name: Newzers
characters.description: Color-Coded for Your Convenience: Blue, black, yellow, and red. Intrepid Reporter: All three of them have a tendency to go into the action of their stories. Kent Brockman News: Their tribe motif is news. Big Ol' Eyebrows: Sports a thick brown pair. The Leader: Of his tribe.

characters.name: Nixels
characters.description: Adorable Evil Minions: Despite being evil, they do have a traditional cuteness to them. Armless Biped: The hands on their shells areonlyon their shells, which are easily removable. Ax-Crazy: They’re all very homicidal and wanted to destroy Mixel Land. Back for the Finale: After their absence inEvery Knight Has Its Day, they along with King Nixel appear inNixel, Nixel, Go Away, the final episode of the series. Berserk Button: They absolutelydespisethe Mixels and their creativity.
